title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・BNW、激走

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin reigns supreme in the BNW battle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she basks in her victory, she comes to
appreciate how joyful it is to have equals she can
compete against.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having reached the top, Narita Taishin once
again realizes the importance of rivalry and
friendship.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She declares her next goal to be the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The year-end Grand Prix is where the most
formidable racers test their mettle, and Narita
Taishin wants to see where she truly stands.
